This value is a suggested upper limit for the number of contact items you can pass in the aggregate calls to [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactItemChangeObserver/didUpdate(_:)] and [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactItemChangeObserver/didDelete(_:)]. # suggestedBatchSize

**Instance Property**

Retrieves the suggested number of changed contact items to include in a batch.

## Declaration

```swift
var suggestedBatchSize: Int { get }
```

## Discussion

This value is a suggested upper limit for the number of contact items you can pass in the aggregate calls to [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactItemChangeObserver/didUpdate(_:)] and [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactItemChangeObserver/didDelete(_:)]. Exceeding this limit may result in memory issues.
title: suggestedBatchSize
